name: add_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem add_comm_rule (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  induction' b with k ih
  · simp
  · simp [Nat.add_succ, ih, Nat.succ_add]
    <;> ring
```

name: list_length
output:
```lean
def length : List α → Nat
  | [] => 0
  | h :: t => length t + 1
```

name: and_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem propositional_conjunction_commutative (P Q : Prop) : P ∧ Q ↔ Q ∧ P := by
  constructor
  intro h
  exact ⟨h.2, h.1⟩
  intro h
  exact ⟨h.2, h.1⟩
```
